title: Test Smarter, Not Harder: Risk-Based Data Quality Without Pipeline Paralysis

summary: Upstream schema changes were breaking our finance pipelines daily. With monthly reporting deadlines looming, we needed to balance data quality with pipeline reliability. title: Investigation: Identical Servers, Different Performance
author: Simonas Rupšys
summary: Inconsistent Redis performance was observed across a fleet of otherwise identical servers. After investigation, we discovered that differences in Linux system clocksource settings - specifically, servers running the slower HPET clocksource instead of the default TSC - led to significant increases in Redis latency and CPU usage. This post summarizes our findings, shows how to spot and fix the issue,…
